ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_title" TEXT /* Title of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "e_issn" TEXT /* Electronic International Standard Serial Number (E-ISSN) of the journal */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the journal is published */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the journal */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the journal was founded */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Publication frequency (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Journal's impact factor */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the journal is open access */,
  "editor_in_chief" INTEGER /* ID of the editor-in-chief */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Main subject area of the journal */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the journal's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_editor_in_chief FOREIGN KEY ("editor_in_chief") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "number_of_journals" INTEGER /* Total number of journals published by the publisher */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal where the article is published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the article */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the article */,
  "page_start" INTEGER /* Starting page number of the article */,
  "page_end" INTEGER /* Ending page number of the article */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the article (e.g., PDF, HTML, XML) */,
  "doi_registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the DOI was registered */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the article is open access */,
  "peer_review_status" TEXT /* Status of the peer review process (e.g., submitted, accepted, rejected) */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, published, retracted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "is_corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the author is the corresponding author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the article */,
  "is_corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the author is the corresponding author for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword text */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the keyword in the articles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_keywords" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_metrics" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the article */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation count was last updated */,
  "citation_sources" TEXT /* Sources of the citations (e.g., Google Scholar, Web of Science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the article */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the download count was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the downloads (e.g., direct download, academic search engine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, publisher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal being accessed */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the journal or article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the journal or article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the journal or article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal of the subscription plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription plan is due for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_plans_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user of the subscription */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription plan */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription ends */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription is due for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subscription is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peer review */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is anonymous */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviews_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the reviewer */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the reviewer */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the reviewer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the reviewer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)
